<!--
  Thanks for opening a PR! Please read CONTRIBUTING.md before requesting review.
  Complete the sections that apply; delete the rest.
-->

## Summary

<!-- 1-3 sentences on WHAT this changes and WHY. Not a commit message. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bugfix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Infra / CI
- [ ] Test-only

## Linked issues

<!-- e.g. "Fixes #123", "Refs #456" -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `pytest` passes locally
- [ ] `npm test` passes locally
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes locally
- [ ] If backend route changed: regenerated `docs/openapi.json`
- [ ] If component changed: added / updated RTL test
- [ ] If `firestore.rules` changed: updated rules test
- [ ] Docs updated (`README.md` / `docs/*.md`) where applicable
- [ ] No secrets / `.env` / service-account JSON committed

## Testing

<!--
  How did you verify this works? Include:
  - Commands you ran
  - Expected vs observed output
  - Screenshots for UI changes
-->

## Screenshots / demo

<!-- If UI change, attach before/after screenshots or a short clip. -->

## Risk / rollout notes

<!--
  - Is this backward compatible?
  - Does it need a data migration?
  - Can it be safely reverted?
-->
